questionHtml: From the results of this investigation, suggest a possible consequence of shorter titin on movement.
markschemeHtml:
muscles with shorter titin will be more resistant to movement/ perform less movement/ contract/stretch less;

 

Accept reverse argument.

meta.title: From the results of this investigation, suggest a possible consequence of shorter titin on movement.
